weeks.strategy_notes: Week 2: 14 XL tickets based on Dec 20 post-mortem - strong [12,13] and 44 anchors
Week 2: 2 Lotto tickets using proven anchors 23, 39 from Dec 20
Week 3: Dropped [12,13] and 44 anchors. New focus on 27 (hit both games), [14,18,28] cluster, [39,41] pair
Week 3: Using proven 27 anchor, adding low numbers 6,15 and mid-30s 36,37
Week 3: New focus on 27, [14,18,28] cluster, [39,41] pair
Week 3: Using proven 27 anchor + low numbers 6,15
Week 4: Reduced Pool Protocol (Golden 30) - Orthogonal Coverage
Week 5: Mathematically guaranteed 3-match if 4 of 12 numbers hit
weeks.guarantee: If ANY 4 of the 12 wheel numbers appear in the winning 6, at least one ticket has 3+ matches
